0.q: other secondary metabolites related to plant's antioxidant system along with activities of antioxidant enzymes (SOD, CAT; two to fourfold) were enhanced in WsSGTL1-Nt as compared to WT.

1.q: Enhanced accumulation of main sterols like, campesterol, stigmasterol and sitosterol in glycosylated form was observed in WsSGTL1-Nt plants.

2.q: Plant sterol glycosyltransferase (SGT) enzymes catalyze glycosylation of phytosterols and related compounds to generate their glycoconjugates; overexpression altered conjugated sterol levels with significant enhancement in stigmasterol in transgenic lines.
